        { tab: '.tab-three', content: '.content-tab-three' },
        { tab: '.tab-four', content: '.content-tab-four' },
        { tab: '.tab-five', content: '.content-tab-five' }
    ];

    const allContents = document.querySelectorAll('.tab-content');

    tabs.forEach(item => {

        const tab = document.querySelector(item.tab);

        tab.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
            e.preventDefault();

            // hide all
            allContents.forEach(content => {
                content.classList.remove('active');
            });

            // show selected
            const activeContent = document.querySelector(item.content);
            activeContent.classList.add('active');

        });

    });

});

</script>
